prompt: I want to add crash reporting to my iOS app. Should I use Sentry or Crashlytics? What are the trade-offs?

assertions.text: Mentions Crashlytics limitation of 8 non-fatal exceptions per session
assertions.rationale: Skill-specific knowledge about Crashlytics limits — baseline almost never mentions this

assertions.text: Warns against running both for fatal crash reporting (signal handler conflicts)
assertions.rationale: Skill covers signal handler conflicts — critical production knowledge

assertions.text: Recommends wrapping behind a protocol/abstraction layer (ErrorReporter)
assertions.rationale: Skill's architectural pattern — enables vendor swapping and testability
